subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and He Who speaketh in the realm of creation is verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و الذی ینطق فی الامکان انه لهو الذی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
